name: xargs
description: Build and execute command lines from standard input

globalOptions.name: -I
globalOptions.description: Replace occurrences of replace-str in command

globalOptions.name: -n
globalOptions.description: Use at most N arguments per command

globalOptions.name: -P
globalOptions.description: Run up to N processes in parallel

globalOptions.name: -t
globalOptions.description: Print the command line before executing

globalOptions.name: -p
globalOptions.description: Prompt user before executing each command

globalOptions.name: -r
globalOptions.description: Do not run if stdin is empty
